description: Agent-governance demo corpus retrieval quality suite. Synthetic but representative until a design-partner corpus is available; each case names the primary expected document.

cases.query: what fields should an OpenTelemetry evidence span include for context retrieval
how do we prove what context grounded an agent answer during audit
which policy explains version checksums and stale document drift
EU AI Act logging controls for high risk agents
human oversight checkpoints approve high risk agent actions regulated advice production deployment
how should agent tool permissions and scopes be governed
prompt injection incident playbook for hostile instructions and tool limits
investigate agent cost spike from retrieval volume model calls and tool fanout
redact PII from evidence payloads without storing document bodies
what belongs in an agent registry entry owner tools risk tier evidence
what should an audit evidence bundle include for an agent incident
classify agent incident severity and escalate policy violations
support bot refund policy approval threshold and context version
support agent customer data boundary tenant filters case id privacy
design golden queries with expected ids for retrieval quality gates
roll out semantic embedding provider after measuring recall and MRR baseline
full GraphRAG multi hop relationship weighting entity aware traversal
MeshAI control plane connects registry telemetry policies cost intelligence audit artifacts
detect unusual retrieval volume sensitive data domains policy denials cost anomalies
fan out OTLP evidence spans to Datadog Honeycomb Tempo and MeshAI
